_comment: Hand-derived (implementation-plan.md fixtures rule, WP-11), same envelope assumption as steps.json (see its _comment). Core Body Temperature is a Sample (S) type per base-knowledge.md §3; value key `core_body_temperature.celsius` (field name assumed; Celsius chosen to match HealthKit's own degreeCelsius unit, avoiding an unconfirmed Fahrenheit conversion). Mirrored in SyncKit's TypeMapperFixtures.coreBodyTemperaturePoint().
